title: Operate complex slicing and packaging machinery
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate complex slicing and packaging machinery demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Set up equipment for operation

pcs.text: Confirm and load packaging components and consumables, materials and items to be packaged or sliced to meet operating requirements1.2 Identify and confirm cleaning and maintenance requirements, and status1.3 Fit and adjust machine components and related attachments to meet operating requirements1.4 Carry out pre-start checks as required by workplace requirements1.5 Use appropriate Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) as provided
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm and load packaging components and consumables, materials and items to be packaged or sliced to meet operating requirements1.2 Identify and confirm cleaning and maintenance requirements, and status1.3 Fit and adjust machine components and related attachments to meet operating requirements1.4 Carry out pre-start checks as required by workplace requirements1.5 Use appropriate Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) as provided?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm and load packaging components and consumables, materials and items to be packaged or sliced to meet operating requirements1.2 Identify and confirm cleaning and maintenance requirements, and status1.3 Fit and adjust machine components and related attachments to meet operating requirements1.4 Carry out pre-start checks as required by workplace requirements1.5 Use appropriate Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) as provided.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Set up equipment for operation

elements.title: Operate slicing and packaging machinery

pcs.text: Start and operate process according to workplace procedures and product specifications2.2 Monitor equipment to identify variation in operating conditions2.3 Identify variation in equipment operation and report maintenance requirements according to workplace reporting requirements2.4 Take appropriate remedial action to correct any faults in process or product2.5 Meet workplace housekeeping standards2.6 Meet daily production schedule2.7 Maintain workplace records according to workplace recording requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Start and operate process according to workplace procedures and product specifications2.2 Monitor equipment to identify variation in operating conditions2.3 Identify variation in equipment operation and report maintenance requirements according to workplace reporting requirements2.4 Take appropriate remedial action to correct any faults in process or product2.5 Meet workplace housekeeping standards2.6 Meet daily production schedule2.7 Maintain workplace records according to workplace recording requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Start and operate process according to workplace procedures and product specifications2.2 Monitor equipment to identify variation in operating conditions2.3 Identify variation in equipment operation and report maintenance requirements according to workplace reporting requirements2.4 Take appropriate remedial action to correct any faults in process or product2.5 Meet workplace housekeeping standards2.6 Meet daily production schedule2.7 Maintain workplace records according to workplace recording requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Operate slicing and packaging machinery

elements.title: Ensure smooth operation of process

pcs.text: Identify potential dangers from hazards and take appropriate precautions3.2 Check and adjust equipment performance as required3.3 Use clear and accurate oral communication with team members3.4 Encourage and support team members to work as an effective team3.5 Follow safe working procedures at all times
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential dangers from hazards and take appropriate precautions3.2 Check and adjust equipment performance as required3.3 Use clear and accurate oral communication with team members3.4 Encourage and support team members to work as an effective team3.5 Follow safe working procedures at all times?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential dangers from hazards and take appropriate precautions3.2 Check and adjust equipment performance as required3.3 Use clear and accurate oral communication with team members3.4 Encourage and support team members to work as an effective team3.5 Follow safe working procedures at all times.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Ensure smooth operation of process

elements.title: Shut down the process

pcs.text: Identify appropriate shut-down procedure4.2 Shut-down process according to workplace procedures4.3 Promptly, clearly and accurately report faults and variances outside area of responsibility to an appropriate authority
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify appropriate shut-down procedure4.2 Shut-down process according to workplace procedures4.3 Promptly, clearly and accurately report faults and variances outside area of responsibility to an appropriate authority?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify appropriate shut-down procedure4.2 Shut-down process according to workplace procedures4.3 Promptly, clearly and accurately report faults and variances outside area of responsibility to an appropriate authority.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Shut down the process
